classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为反馈线针脚表，表头含'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'颜色 COLOR'和'WIRE GAGE'，行内给出1到8号针脚与'DC +5V'、'GND'、'U'、'/U'、'Z'、'B'、'A'等反馈信号及线色、28AWG线径的对应关系；全图中该区域位于'反馈线 Feedback Wire'表格内，因此归入反馈连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'DB 15M'反馈连接器针位示意，显示1、5、6、10、11、15等针脚编号，并有引线标注'SHIELD'屏蔽；全图中该区域位于'反馈线 Feedback Wire'表旁，工程含义为反馈接口针位与屏蔽连接。

The three numeric labels are positioned below the connector pin pattern and correspond to connector pin numbering, not mechanical dimensions.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标区域是动力线接线表，包含针脚号 1/2/3/4 与功能 U相、V相、W相、接地 MOTOR PE 的对应关系，并标出颜色黄、红、黑、黄绿及线径 16AWG，符合动力接口针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪图仅显示四芯连接器外形、针位编号 1/2/3/4，以及 'Housing:H66L6-04P'、'Terminal:T66L6-B' 等壳体/端子型号信息，没有出现针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此应归为连接器结构类的机械尺寸信息。

terminology_notes: Detected OCR items are connector pin numbers, not dimensional measurements.

dimension_records.reason: OCR text is a clear numeric label inside the upper-left connector cavity, indicating a connector pin position rather than a dimensional value.
OCR text is a clear numeric label inside the upper-right connector cavity, indicating a connector pin position rather than a dimensional value.
OCR text is a clear numeric label inside the lower-left connector cavity, indicating a connector pin position rather than a dimensional value.
OCR text is a clear numeric label inside the lower-right connector cavity, indicating a connector pin position rather than a dimensional value.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: The crop shows a 4-position connector pin layout with visible pin labels 1, 2, 3, and 4.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector model, terminal model, dimensions, tolerances, and units are not present as OCR source text in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是一个键槽/键尺寸示意图，包含 '16'、'5' 的尺寸标注和 'KEY' 结构标识，没有引脚功能、接线定义或表格信息，属于机械尺寸类图纸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Rotated OCR text retained as dimension value 5.

terminology_notes: KEY is preserved as the visible feature label rather than translated into a numeric dimension.

dimension_records.reason: The value 16 is placed above the elongated slot with horizontal dimension arrows, indicating key slot length.
The rotated value 5 is adjacent to the vertical dimension arrows across the slot height, indicating key slot width.
The text KEY is an independent visible label identifying the illustrated key feature.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Key feature shown with length 16 mm and width 5 mm based on available OCR sources.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: A second visible 5 dimension appears in the image context but has no usable OCR source_id in the provided source boxes, so it is not added as a separate annotation.

unresolved_items.issue: Likely false OCR from geometry or slot outline, not a reliable visible text annotation; excluded from final text_annotations.

classification.reason: 该裁剪图主要是电机前视结构及安装尺寸示意，能看到'Power Wire'、'Feedback Wire'、'DB 15M'等连接器/线缆外形标注，以及'4-Ø5.5'、'φ70±0.1'等机械安装尺寸，但没有引脚编号与功能对应关系，因此归为机械尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected spacing from OCR text DB15M; overlapping ocr_002 is a duplicate partial reading.
Corrected spacing from OCR text PowerWire; overlapping partial readings ocr_004, ocr_005 and ocr_006 are duplicates.
Corrected spacing from OCR text FeedbackWire; overlapping partial readings ocr_008 and ocr_012 are duplicates, and ocr_010, ocr_011, ocr_013 are noise inside the same label area.
Corrected OCR text 4-5.5 by restoring the visible diameter symbol.
OCR captured only a low-confidence fragment of the visible angular callout; corrected to 45° based on the same source region.
OCR captured only 0 from the visible vertical square-size dimension; corrected to □60.
OCR captured V1 from the visible circled revision/version mark; corrected to V1.2.
Corrected OCR text 70±0.1 by restoring the visible diameter symbol.

translation_notes: Power Wire translated as 动力线.
Feedback Wire translated as 反馈线.

dimension_records.reason: DB 15M is attached by a leader to the feedback-side connector and is a connector type label, not a dimensional value.
The callout is a leader label identifying the left cable assembly.
The callout is a leader label identifying the right cable assembly.
The callout points to the four flange mounting holes and specifies quantity plus hole diameter.
The angular dimension is shown on the right-side construction arc near the mounting hole pattern, but OCR evidence is only a partial fragment.
The vertical dimension at the left of the flange indicates square size 60, though OCR captured only the final digit.
The circled text is a version/revision mark and not a mechanical dimension.
The leader points to the dashed bolt circle passing through the mounting holes, indicating the hole pattern diameter tolerance.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Four Φ5.5 mounting holes on a Φ70±0.1 pitch circle, with a visible 45° angular reference and □60 flange size.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Square flange size is shown as □60; other envelope dimensions are not specified in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Power Wire and Feedback Wire are separately labeled; feedback-side connector is marked DB 15M.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR did not provide reliable source boxes for any additional visible shaft or inner-feature dimensions in this crop.

unresolved_items.description: Several overlapping OCR fragments were removed as duplicates or noise: ocr_002, ocr_004, ocr_005, ocr_006, ocr_007, ocr_008, ocr_010, ocr_011, ocr_012, ocr_013.
unresolved_items.reason: These readings overlap higher-quality complete labels or are low-confidence fragments not representing independent engineering annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机外形与轴端结构尺寸图，含电机本体轮廓、轴径、键槽、长度尺寸、公差和形位公差标注，并有'Housing:H66L6-04P'、'Terminal:T66L6-B'及'L≥500'等连接器和线缆长度说明；未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此最符合机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图中对应左下角标注区域，标题为'Performance Curve'，图内有扭矩轴'T(N.m)'、转速轴'n(rpm)'，并标出'Intermittent'和'Continuous'两条工作曲线及3900 rpm等转速点，属于电机扭矩-转速性能曲线。
